title: WeaponTrims
body:
(OPTIFINE REQUIRED) This resource pack adds armor trims to weapons, and even has some secret swords as well

You can get the colors on the swords via naming them in an anvil
ex: "Diamond Sword Emerald" without the quotations will result in giving your diamond sword an emerald trim

currently only trims for netherite and diamond swords exist, however trims will be coming to bows, axes, and more in the future!
